sessionStart.bash: echo "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) EVENT=session_start REPO=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown') BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown')" >> ~/.copilot/logs/session-history.log || true

sessionEnd.bash: echo "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) EVENT=session_end REPO=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown') BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown')" >> ~/.copilot/logs/session-history.log || true
